Class Tile

java.lang.Object
track.Tile
public class Tile extends Object
Tile.java Code Description: This class represents a single Tile/Pixel of the track. It generates a variance of a base color for its specific tile type when generated.

    Tile.Surface
    Enumeration to store surface data

  • Constructor Details

    • Tile

      public Tile(int xPos, int yPos, char tileType)
      Constructor, Track will read a double array and pass XPos, YPos, and tileType
      Parameters:
      xPos - the xPos of the tile in the array
      yPos - the yPos of the tile in the array
      tileType - the char of the tileyupe

  • Method Details

    • getTileColor

      public Color getTileColor()
      Getter for tile color
      Returns:
      the Color of the tile

    • setHitCheckpoint

      public void setHitCheckpoint(boolean b)
      Setter for if the checkpoint is hit or not yet, used to change color based on this boolean value
      Parameters:
      b - boolean true if hit, false otherwise

      Get the X position of the Tile in the track
      Returns:

    • getYPos

      public int getYPos()
      Get the Y position of the Tile in the track

      int yPos, Y position of the Tile in the track

      public Tile.Surface getSurface()
      Getter for Surface enumeration of tile
      Returns:
      the Surface of the tile

    • getTileType

      public char getTileType()
      Getter for the Tile's tileType
      Returns:
      char tileType, char representing the tile in file

    • isCheckpoint

      public boolean isCheckpoint()
      Getter for is this Tile a checkpoint, used in checkpointGroups
      Returns:
      boolean true if checkpoint, false otherwise

    • getTileSize

      public static int getTileSize()
      This method is static so I can access it without initializing a tile for GUI purposes
      Returns:
      TILE_SIZE the size of the tile # x #
